# Frameworks and Platforms

> The infrastructure powering **Large Agentic Models (LAMs)** and multi-agent systems. The conversation has moved past simple LLMs and chatbots -- AGI is about systems that take actions. These frameworks let you build, orchestrate, and deploy AI agents that can reason, browse, code, and collaborate autonomously.

![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3776AB?style=flat-square&logo=python&logoColor=white) ![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-007ACC?style=flat-square&logo=typescript&logoColor=white) ![Rust](https://img.shields.io/badge/Rust-000000?style=flat-square&logo=rust&logoColor=white) ![Multi-Agent](https://img.shields.io/badge/Multi--Agent-blue?style=flat-square) ![Browser](https://img.shields.io/badge/Browser_Automation-orange?style=flat-square) ![Open Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/Open_Source-green?style=flat-square)

### Agent Communication Protocols

> Standardized protocols enabling agents to discover tools, communicate with services, and coordinate with each other -- the TCP/IP of the agentic era.

| Protocol | Description | Links |
|----------|-------------|-------|
| **MCP (Model Context Protocol)** | Anthropic's protocol for connecting AI to external tools/data. Adopted by Claude, Cursor, Windsurf. Emerging agent-tool standard. | [modelcontextprotocol.io](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/), [GitHub](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol) |
| **A2A (Agent-to-Agent Protocol)** | Google's protocol for inter-agent communication. Discover capabilities, negotiate tasks, collaborate securely. | [google.github.io/A2A](https://google.github.io/A2A/) |
| **ACP (Agent Communication Protocol)** | BeeAI's protocol for structured agent messaging. Streaming, async tasks, multi-turn interactions. | [github.com/i-am-bee/beeai](https://github.com/i-am-bee/beeai) |

### Next-Generation Agent Frameworks (2025-2026)

|Name|Github Stars|Introduction| Notes |
|-|-|-|-|
|[OpenHands](https://github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands)|AI software development agent (formerly OpenDevin). Writes, tests, and debugs code end-to-end.|71k+ stars. #1 on SWE-bench. Sandboxed execution environment.|
|[browser-use](https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/browser-use/browser-use)|Playwright-based browser automation for AI agents. Makes websites accessible to agents.|87k+ stars. AI agents that browse the web autonomously.|
|[DeerFlow](https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/bytedance/deer-flow)|ByteDance SuperAgent for research, coding, and creation. Multi-agent with sandboxes and tools.|60k+ stars. Built on LangGraph.|
|[Firecrawl](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/firecrawl/firecrawl)|Web Data API for AI. Scrapes and converts websites to LLM-ready markdown.|108k+ stars. Used by major AI agent frameworks.|
|[crewAI](https://github.com/joaomdmoura/crewAI)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/joaomdmoura/crewAI)|Orchestrate role-playing, autonomous AI agent crews for complex tasks.|Production-grade multi-agent orchestration.|
|[agenticSeek](https://github.com/Fosowl/agenticSeek)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/Fosowl/agenticSeek)|Fully local autonomous agent. No APIs, no bills. Thinks, browses, codes with local LLMs.|26k+ stars. Fully local, privacy-first.|
|[Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/google-gemini/gemini-cli)|Google's open-source AI agent bringing Gemini to the terminal. Built-in MCP support.|101k+ stars. Official Google agent.|
|[Hermes Agent](https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/NousResearch/hermes-agent)|Nous Research multi-model AI agent. Supports Claude, GPT, and open-source models.|66k+ stars. From Nous Research.|
|[Daytona](https://github.com/daytonaio/daytona)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/daytonaio/daytona)|Secure, elastic infrastructure for running AI-generated code. Sandboxed execution.|72k+ stars. Secure code execution.|
|[Composio](https://github.com/ComposioHQ/composio)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/ComposioHQ/composio)|250+ tools and integrations for building production agentic AI applications.|[composio.dev](https://composio.dev/)|
|[PentAGI](https://github.com/vxcontrol/pentagi)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/vxcontrol/pentagi)|Autonomous AI for penetration testing. Multi-agent security automation.|15k+ stars. Autonomous security testing.|

### Established Agent Frameworks

|-|-|-|-|
|[Auto-GPT](https://github.com/Significant-Gravitas/Auto-GPT)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/Significant-Gravitas/Auto-GPT)|The original autonomous AI agent. Now a full platform for building and deploying agents.|183k+ stars. The project that started the autonomous agent movement.|
|[MetaGPT](https://github.com/geekan/MetaGPT)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/geekan/MetaGPT)|Multi-Agent Framework: one-line requirement returns PRD, design, tasks, and repo.|Mimics a software company with PM, architect, and engineer agent roles.|
|[SuperAGI](https://github.com/TransformerOptimus/SuperAGI)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/TransformerOptimus/SuperAGI)|Dev-first autonomous agent framework. Concurrent agents with tools, GUI, vector DBs.|Toolkits: Email, Jira, GitHub, Google Search, DALL-E, Notion, etc.|
|[AutoGen](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/microsoft/autogen)|Microsoft's multi-agent conversation framework with human-in-the-loop. Now evolved to AG2.|Now evolved into AG2 with enhanced multi-agent patterns.|
